title: Hongguo Short Drama Releases AI Character Guidelines, Crackdown on Frequent AI Faces and Copyright Infringement
excerpt: On July 24, Hongguo Short Drama released an announcement titled "Announcement on Standardizing AI Drama Character Creation," clearly defining creation standards
content_html:
On July 24, Hongguo Short Drama released an announcement titled "Announcement on Standardizing AI Drama Character Creation," clearly defining creation standards from two aspects: character differentiation and copyright compliance, aiming to reduce the usage rate of "frequent AI faces" and prevent risks of material violations.

The regulations require that main characters in a single drama must have clear distinguishability and high recognizability. It is strictly prohibited to reuse highly similar characters across different dramas or roles to alleviate visual fatigue. In terms of copyright, three red lines are set: it is not allowed to use others' original characters, costumes, and prop designs without authorization; it is strictly forbidden to plagiarize copyrighted photographs and art works; when using copyrighted content, prior authorization is required.

In addition, the platform will launch a special governance campaign to focus on addressing issues such as character reuse, homogenization, and material violations, and will encourage creators to self-examine and make corrections. This marks that the AI short drama industry is accelerating towards a more standardized and refined operation stage.

This marks that the AI short drama industry is accelerating towards a more standardized and refined operation stage.

sentences.zh: 7月24日，红果短剧发布《关于规范AI剧角色创作的公告》，从角色差异化和版权合规两个方面明确创作标准，旨在降低“AI高频面孔”的使用率，防范重大侵权风险。

It is strictly prohibited to reuse highly similar characters across different dramas or roles to alleviate visual fatigue. In terms of copyright, three red lines are set: it is not allowed to use others' original characters, costumes, and prop designs without authorization; it is strictly forbidden to plagiarize copyrighted photographs and art works; when using copyrighted content, prior authorization is required.

sentences.en: The regulations require that main characters in a single drama must have clear distinguishability and high recognizability.
sentences.zh: 规定要求单剧主要人物必须具有鲜明的辨识度和较高的辨识度。

sentences.en: It is strictly prohibited to reuse highly similar characters across different dramas or roles to alleviate visual fatigue.
sentences.zh: 严禁在不同剧目或角色中重复使用高度相似的角色，以缓解视觉疲劳。

sentences.en: In terms of copyright, three red lines are set: it is not allowed to use others' original characters, costumes, and prop designs without authorization; it is strictly forbidden to plagiarize copyrighted photographs and art works; when using copyrighted content, prior authorization is required.
sentences.zh: 在版权方面，设定了三条红线：未经授权不得使用他人原创的角色、服装、道具设计；严禁抄袭受版权保护的照片和艺术作品；使用受版权保护的内容时，需要事先授权。

This marks that the AI short drama industry is accelerating towards a more standardized and refined operation stage.

sentences.zh: 此外，平台还将开展专项治理活动，重点解决角色重用、同质化、实质性违规等问题，鼓励创作者自查整改。

sentences.en: This marks that the AI short drama industry is accelerating towards a more standardized and refined operation stage.
sentences.zh: 这标志着AI短剧行业正在加速迈向更加规范化、精细化的运营阶段。

content_html_zh:
7月24日，红果短剧发布《关于规范AI剧角色创作的公告》，从角色差异化和版权合规两个方面明确创作标准，旨在降低“AI高频面孔”的使用率，防范重大侵权风险。

规定要求单剧主要人物必须具有鲜明的辨识度和较高的辨识度。 严禁在不同剧目或角色中重复使用高度相似的角色，以缓解视觉疲劳。 在版权方面，设定了三条红线：未经授权不得使用他人原创的角色、服装、道具设计；严禁抄袭受版权保护的照片和艺术作品；使用受版权保护的内容时，需要事先授权。

此外，平台还将开展专项治理活动，重点解决角色重用、同质化、实质性违规等问题，鼓励创作者自查整改。 这标志着AI短剧行业正在加速迈向更加规范化、精细化的运营阶段。
